blocks.text: they're tiny glass retro-reflectors that have been made for a number of different purposes, including growth illumination, in this particular embodiment, I want to make tiny glass retro-reflectors that are additionally mirrored in a way that the refractive index matches that of human tissue. The inclusion of these under the skin will give tiny spots that will only show up under flash or very bright light. it's also possible to make these glow in the dark
